svg.title: Hamster mini-sleep v1 (scripted)
svg.desc: Mini-mode sleep for clawd-on-desk / MiniCPM-Desk-Pet, right-edge variant (host mirrors for left edge). Host semantics: this is the Do-Not-Disturb resting state — applied on DND enable in mini mode and auto-returned to from other mini states while DND is on; hovering the sleeping pet pushes the window out 25px (host PEEK_OFFSET window animation) while this SVG keeps sleeping, so the pose must (and does) hold up with more body revealed. Confirmed by 鹿鹿 2026-06-15 (three review rounds — round 3 客户「too stiff/喜欢大幅度」feedback): paws stay clamped on the screen edge (transforms byte-frozen to the base-pose strings), no entrance — pure sleep loop. Round-3 amplified breath: 4s cycle (was 5.6s main-line, sped up to pair with bigger amplitude), body swell about (187,322) ×5 amp = sx ±12% / sy ±9% / by ±8px (was ±2.4%/±1.8%/±1.6px), far-edge pixel excursion ≈17px after the -90deg pose rotation it reads as a lying belly clearly rising and falling. Three Zzz with stagger delays 0/0.23/0.46 and easeOutCubic appear/drift/fade. Round-2 look kept: Zzz anchored to an emergence point by the upper ear drifting up-left away from the head (never covering the head cap — verified per-frame via elementsFromPoint), closed eyes (verbatim main-line sleeping arcs behind the .97 lenses, open-eye ellipses hidden), relaxed symmetric sleep brows (verbatim main-line) lifted 4px away from the sunglasses. Head droops -7deg about the neck (187,252) via the sleep-head-tilt wrapper with a 7.1deg inhale lift (peak reaches +0.1° = essentially horizontal, reads as a deep-breath neck stretch, not a backwards overshoot — verified); tufts float ±1.5° offset-phase on top of the baked 32° gravity angle; tie micro-sways ±0.4° about the knot center via the sleep-tie-sway wrapper (baked tie strings untouched); mouth is the confirmed thinking dasharray inset breathing 16→18. Self-driven infinite loop, no pointer feed, no engine; svg root keeps pointer-events:none for embedding pages. Pure paths + soft-lift filter, no image/gradient/fetch.
